combat_history.event: First successful test of Kh-47M2 Kinzhal hypersonic missile from MiG-31BM
First combat use of Kinzhal missile against underground weapons storage in Deliatyn
combat_history.significance: First operational use of air-launched hypersonic weapon in combat

combat_history.event: Multiple Kinzhal strikes against Ukrainian infrastructure and military targets
combat_history.significance: Operational validation of hypersonic strike capability

modernization.description: Comprehensive modernization of existing MiG-31 fleet with new radar, avionics, weapons compatibility
modernization.impact: Extends service life to 2030s, adds hypersonic weapons capability

modernization.description: Latest upgrade standard with enhanced electronic warfare suite and improved datalink
modernization.impact: Improved survivability against modern air defenses

vulnerabilities.description: Large, heavy interceptor with limited dogfighting capability and high IR signature
vulnerabilities.context: Vulnerable to modern fighters in close combat, particularly F-22/F-35 with stealth advantage
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Relies on long-range engagement and avoiding close combat

vulnerabilities.description: Older electronic systems vulnerable to modern jamming despite upgrades
vulnerabilities.context: Western EW capabilities can potentially degrade radar effectiveness
vulnerabilities.mitigation: BSM upgrade includes improved EW resistance

vulnerabilities.description: Complex, maintenance-intensive platform with limited spare parts production
vulnerabilities.context: Sanctions impact on Western components affects readiness rates
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Import substitution program for critical components

operational_patterns.typical_deployment: Long-range intercept patrols, hypersonic strike missions
operational_patterns.typical_task_group: Operates in pairs for mutual support and extended radar coverage
operational_patterns.readiness_notes: Estimated 60-70% readiness rate due to maintenance complexity and parts availability

peer_comparisons.key_differences: F-15EX more maneuverable and modern avionics, MiG-31BM faster with longer range and hypersonic weapons
peer_comparisons.video_angle: Speed vs agility: Arctic interceptor vs multi-role fighter comparison

peer_comparisons.key_differences: F-22 has stealth and superior maneuverability, MiG-31BM has speed, range, and anti-stealth radar claims
peer_comparisons.video_angle: Stealth vs speed: Can the Foxhound hunt the Raptor?

peer_comparisons.key_differences: J-20 emphasizes stealth and agility, MiG-31BM focuses on raw speed and range
peer_comparisons.video_angle: Russia vs China interceptor philosophy comparison

peer_comparisons.key_differences: Typhoon more agile with modern electronics, MiG-31BM has speed advantage and hypersonic weapons
peer_comparisons.video_angle: NATO's northern flank defense vs Russian Arctic interceptor
